evidence_summary: The protagonist must execute a physically impossible thirty-foot leap across the circular_moss_basin to escape capture. This movement serves as the pivot point where martian_warriors cease treating the protagonist as prey and begin viewing him as a scientif...

To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."
